title: Structure Crafter
description: A balanced, convenient, and practical bulk-building mod designed primarily for survival gameplay.这是一个兼具平衡性，便利性和实用性的主用于生存的批量建筑模组
body:
_Note: This mod is still in a testing phase. Please make sure to back up your world saves before adding it._

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac91f7ec1cba316376b4fb47a7889b17b3c2b13b.png)

**New Version 0.2.0 Telephone Ringing is NOW RELEASE !**

Structure Crafter is a functional bulk-building mod designed primarily for survival gameplay, balancing practicality, convenience, and usability. Its core design philosophy focuses on being survival-friendly and easy to use.

You don’t need to set up extra infrastructure such as generators to access the mod’s features. Instead, you use a Blackboard to record structures you want to place in bulk, and a Structure Wand to construct them according to configurable patterns (materials will be consumed from your inventory in survival mode).

The mod provides a variety of configurable options, making repetitive building tasks intuitive and efficient. Everything is designed to be visual and real-time, so your actions are clearly reflected in the game.

In terms of usability, the mod requires no complex learning curve or complicated crafting recipes, emphasizing a lightweight and streamlined experience.

Additionally, structures are stored using the vanilla NBT format from Structure Blocks, ensuring compatibility with vanilla structures and schematics from mods like Create.

# **Main Features**
## 🫵 **Intuitive Visualization System**

Tired of rigid and inconvenient selection tools in other mods?

This mod introduces the Blackboard as a way to record selections. All adjustments to the selection area are presented through smooth, intuitive animations.

Once a selection is made, hold the Blackboard in your off-hand and an ink sac in your main hand to draw the structure directly onto the Blackboard—literally drawing it.

Every action you take is visually represented in real time.

## 👷 **Designed for Practical Use**

Placing streetlights in survival mode is exhausting… especially when they’re all nearly identical.

If you’ve run into this problem, this mod is exactly what you need.

Simply record all variations onto your Blackboard, then use the Structure Wand—

and give your hands a break. Everything just flows naturally.

## 🤔 **Intuitive Controls**

Wish you could select points directly in mid-air? Freely adjust width, height, and depth?

This mod provides an intuitive and flexible control system that feels natural while remaining easy to use.

## 🔳 **Unique UI Design**

If you're tired of vanilla-style interfaces or uninterested in modern flat UI design,

this mod offers a distinct indie-style UI experience, complete with small hidden details and playful surprises waiting to be discovered.

# Changelog
## v0.1.1
- Added a Material List feature
- Hold the Material List in your off-hand and use the Structure Wand in your main hand to select a structure, and the required materials will be automatically recorded
- Right-click to open the Material List and preview required materials and the number of structures you can build
## v0.2.0
- Added on-screen key prompt HUD
- Added telephones and handheld receivers.
- You can now connect telephones(Right Click and keep in inventory) to containers to remotely access their inventory.
- Use ACTIVE Beacon to make telephone wireless. Then There is no distance restrict, or 32 blocks is the default use distance.
- Drop TelephoneHandset to put it back, or just hold it and right click its source block.
## v0.2.1
- Added three configurable modes to address NBT block item duplication issues:
NBT Blacklist, Ignore All NBT, and Preserve All NBT.
- Improved the organization of configuration options.
- Added new rendering animations for the telephone.
- When holding the correct handset and aiming at the telephone, a ghost preview will indicate valid placement.
- Removed the **Ponder** dependency from versions 0.1.0–0.2.0.
**Configuration** is now handled in-game. Please install the Configured mod to access config settings.
## v0.2.2
- The structure upload logic has been rewritten, and now provides better support for server-side functionality.
- The mod no longer experiences synchronization issues when used on a server.
